DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT A-PARATRANSIT CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL ALJARITA STEWARTS RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO AND FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANT A-PARATRANSIT CORP'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE OBJECTION-FREE, CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $742.50 ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT A-PARATRANSIT CORP. SANCTIONS ARE DUE WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, COPY OPPOSING SIDE AND SEND IT DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM PETER CATALANOTTI AT PCATALANOTTI@FMGLAW.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Aljarita Stewarts Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frederick James, Esq. 510-430-8243 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Jeffrey Schwalbach, Esq. 650-871-9544 of Cholakian & Associates for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT A-PARATRANSIT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Aljarita Stewarts Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant A-Paratransit Corp's unopposed Motion to Compel plaintiff's responses to Special Interrogatories, Set Two is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide objection-free, code-compliant responses to Special Interrogatories, Set Two within one week of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $742.50 are awarded against plaintiff in favor of Defendant A-Paratransit Corp. Sanctions are due within two weeks of this order.

Defendant's Counsel to submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling, copy opposing side and send it directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti at pcatalanotti@fmglaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
